meaning: n.首领,领袖,酋长,长官,主要部分,最有价值的部分adj.主要的,首要的,首席的,主任的
examples: Unemployment was the chief cause of poverty.
Rainey's chief interest in life is hunting with hounds.
Yesterday saw the resignation of the chief financial officer.
The water company Thames Water has doubled the salary of its chief executive, Bill Alexander.
Miles Beale, the group's chief executive, is clear he thinks the government is making a mistake.
